documents.name: DocOnlineServicioWeb
documents.definition:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><wsdl:definitions xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:ns1="http://org.apache.axis2/xsd" xmlns:ns="http://impl.ws.doconline.coninf.com.ar" xmlns:wsaw="http://www.w3.org/2006/05/addressing/wsdl" xmlns:ax25="http://request.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd" xmlns:http="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/http/" xmlns:ax23="http://response.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd" xmlns:ax21="http://tx.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:mime="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/mime/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" targetNamespace="http://impl.ws.doconline.coninf.com.ar">
    <wsdl:documentation>DocOnlineServicioWeb</wsdl:documentation>
    <wsdl:types>
        <xs:schema xmlns:ax26="http://tx.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd" attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://request.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd">
            <xs:import namespace="http://tx.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd"/>
            <xs:complexType name="Request">
                <xs:sequence>
                    <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="controlTransaccion" nillable="true" type="ax21:ControlTransaccion"/>
                </xs:sequence>
            </xs:complexType>
            <xs:complexType name="RequestConsultarPadronLocal">
                <xs:complexContent>
                    <xs:extension base="ax25:Request">
                        <xs:sequence>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cbte" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cuit" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ptoVta" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tipoCbte" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/>
                        </xs:sequence>
                    </xs:extension>
                </xs:complexContent>
            </xs:complexType>
            <xs:complexType name="RequestConsultarPadronOnline">
                <xs:complexContent>
                    <xs:extension base="ax25:Request">
                        <xs:sequence>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cbte" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cuit" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ptoVta" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tipoCbte" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/>
                        </xs:sequence>
                    </xs:extension>
                </xs:complexContent>
            </xs:complexType>
            <xs:complexType name="RequestActualizarItemComprobante">

                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="fechaServHasta" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>

                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="impOpEx" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="impTotConcNoGrav" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="impTotal" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/>

                            <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="ivas" nillable="true" type="ax21:TipoIva"/>

                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="monedaId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nroCbte" nillable="true" type="xs:long"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nroDoc" nillable="true" type="xs:long"/>

                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tipoDoc" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/>
                            <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="tributos" nillable="true" type="ax21:Tributo"/>
                        </xs:sequence>
                    </xs:extension>
                </xs:complexContent>
            </xs:complexType>

                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="obs" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="xmlRequest" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="xmlResponse" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                        </xs:sequence>
                    </xs:extension>
                </xs:complexContent>
            </xs:complexType>
            <xs:complexType name="ResponseConsultarUltimoComprobante">

            <xs:complexType name="ResponseAutorizarComprobante">

                    <xs:extension base="ax23:Response">

                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="obs" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="resultado" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="xmlRequest" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="xmlResponse" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                        </xs:sequence>
                    </xs:extension>
                </xs:complexContent>
            </xs:complexType>
            <xs:complexType name="ResponseConsultarPadronLocal">
                <xs:complexContent>
                    <xs:extension base="ax23:Response">
                        <xs:sequence>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cae" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="errMsg" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="excepcionWsaa" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="excepcionWsfev1" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="fechaCbte" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="fechaVencimiento" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="impTotal" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="obs" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="xmlRequest" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="xmlResponse" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                        </xs:sequence>
                    </xs:extension>
                </xs:complexContent>
            </xs:complexType>
            <xs:complexType name="ResponseConsultarPadronOnline">

            <xs:complexType name="ResponseActualizarItemComprobante">

                            <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="errMsg" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>

        <xs:schema attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://tx.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd">

                <xs:sequence>

                    <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nroTransaccion" nillable="true" type="xs:long"/>
                </xs:sequence>
            </xs:complexType>
            <xs:complexType name="Tributo">
                <xs:sequence>
                    <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tributoAlic" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/>

                    <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tributoDesc" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                    <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tributoId" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/>

            </xs:complexType>
            <xs:complexType name="Iva">

            <xs:complexType name="ComprobanteAsociado">
                <xs:sequence>
                    <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cbteNro" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/>

                    <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tipoCbte" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/>

            </xs:complexType>
            <xs:complexType name="DatoOpcional">
                <xs:sequence>

        <xs:schema xmlns:ax27="http://request.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd" xmlns:ax24="http://response.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd" xmlns:ax22="http://tx.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd" attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://impl.ws.doconline.coninf.com.ar">
            <xs:import namespace="http://tx.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd"/>

                        <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ptoVta" type="xs:int"/>

                </xs:complexType>
            </xs:element>
            <xs:element name="consultarComprobanteResponse">

            <xs:element name="consultarUltimoComprobante">

                        <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="impTrib" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/>

                        <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="fechaServDesde" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                        <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="fechaServHasta" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                        <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="monedaId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/>
                        <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="monedaCtz" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/>
